module.name: prefer-nullish-coalescing
module.description: Prefer nullish coalescing instead of a nullish guard ternary.

scenarios.name: should allow explicit nullish coalescing operator
should report a null-check ternary that can be replaced with ??
scenarios.given: const result = value !== null ? value : defaultValue
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the conditional expression

scenarios.name: should report an undefined-check ternary that can be replaced with ??
scenarios.given: const result = value !== undefined ? value : defaultValue
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the conditional expression

scenarios.name: should report a nullish guard using == null that can be replaced with ??
scenarios.given: const result = value == null ? defaultValue : value
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the conditional expression
